title: [4.4.1-rhel] linux, rootless: clamp oom_score_adj if it is too low
body:
backport of:

- 19bd9b33dd8c8f166327f4e1ab18e0cd5afc9180
- 8b4a79a744ac3fd176ca4dc0e3ae40f75159e090

it solves a problem with docker-compose for rootless since it hard codes the oom-score-adj to 0.


```release-note
None
```

since it requires a Jira, I am closing it, since this is not an issue yet (but it could be with an updated crun)
Sounds like a plan @giuseppe we will resurrect this if the problem is encountered.
